basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 under Advt No. ICSR/PR/Advt.119/2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a B.Tech/M.Tech degree in relevant engineering disciplines such as Mechanical, Applied Mechanics, Chemical Engineering, or related fields, along with a valid GATE score, are eligible to apply. Applicants should also possess a strong understanding of fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and heat transfer, while experience i

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/M.Tech in relevant engineering fields (Mechanical/Applied Mechanics/Chemical, etc.), Valid GATE score mandatory, Good fundamental understanding of fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and heat transfer, Expertise in programming (C++/Py) and CFD simulations preferred
qualification.details: B.Tech/M.Tech in relevant engineering fields (Mechanical/Applied Mechanics/Chemical, etc.). Candidate should have good fundamental understanding of fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and heat transfer. A valid GATE score is mandatory for JRF position. Expertise in programming (C++/Py) and CFD simulations is preferred but not mandatory.

salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month + HRA as per institute norms

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is July 2, 2026. Candidates are urged to apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a B.Tech/M.Tech in relevant engineering fields such as Mechanical, Applied Mechanics, or Chemical. A valid GATE score is also mandatory for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA as per institute norms.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates. Shortlisted candidates will then undergo a test/interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the preferred skills for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, expertise in programming languages like C++ or Python, and experience with CFD simulations are preferred for this position.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Tamil Nadu. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific state-related requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
